name: PT Pelayaran Nasional Bina Buana Raya Tbk
summary: PT Pelayaran Nasional Bina Buana Raya Tbk, a shipping agency company, provides marine logistics services in Indonesia. It operates in two segments, Tug and Barge Vessel; and Offshore Support Vessel. The company offers transportation services for various kinds of bulk mining material, such as coal, granite, and sand for transshipment or delivery via rivers and coastal routes. It operates 34 barges of various sizes and 35 tug boats, as well as one self-propelled barge vessel. The company also charters its vessels to oil and gas companies. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Central Jakarta, Indonesia.
